inputs.label: Transaction Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total amount of the transaction including taxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total amount of the transaction including taxes.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant total de la transaction, taxes comprises.
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto total de la transacción incluyendo impuestos.

inputs.label: Processing Fee Percentage
inputs.businessContext: The percentage fee for domestic card processing (e.g., 2.9% for Stripe).

businessContext_i18n.en: The percentage fee for domestic card processing (e.g., 2.9% for Stripe).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerel kart işleme için yüzde ücreti (örn., Stripe için %2,9).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der prozentuale Satz für die Bearbeitung von Inlandskarten (z.B. 2,9% bei Stripe).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage des frais pour le traitement des cartes nationales (ex. : 2,9 % pour Stripe).
businessContext_i18n.es: El porcentaje de tarifa para procesamiento de tarjetas nacionales (ej: 2.9% para Stripe).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الرسوم لمعالجة البطاقات المحلية (مثال: 2.9% لـ Stripe).

inputs.label: Fixed Fee
inputs.businessContext: The fixed fee per transaction (e.g., $0.30 for Stripe).

businessContext_i18n.en: The fixed fee per transaction (e.g., $0.30 for Stripe).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlem başına sabit ücret (örn., Stripe için $0,30).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die feste Gebühr pro Transaktion (z.B. 0,30 $ bei Stripe).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais fixes par transaction (ex. : 0,30 $ pour Stripe).
businessContext_i18n.es: La tarifa fija por transacción (ej: $0.30 para Stripe).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرسوم الثابتة لكل معاملة (مثال: 0.30 دولار لـ Stripe).

inputs.label: Additional Fee Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage for international cards or currency conversion (Stripe adds 1% for international, another 1% for conversion if needed).

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage for international cards or currency conversion (Stripe adds 1% for international, another 1% for conversion if needed).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uluslararası kartlar veya para birimi dönüşümü için ek yüzde (Stripe uluslararası için %1, gerekirse dönüşüm için ek %1 ekler).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Prozentsatz für internationale Karten oder Währungsumrechnung (Stripe fügt 1% für international, weitere 1% für Umrechnung hinzu, falls erforderlich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage supplémentaire pour les cartes internationales ou la conversion de devises (Stripe ajoute 1 % pour l'international, 1 % supplémentaire pour la conversion si nécessaire).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje adicional para tarjetas internacionales o conversión de moneda (Stripe agrega 1% para internacional, otro 1% para conversión si es necesario).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة إضافية للبطاقات الدولية أو تحويل العملات (يضيف Stripe 1% للدولية، و1% أخرى للتحويل إذا لزم الأمر).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
